children.text: In the Daliang Mountains, tall green trees grow. Birds sing all around.
children.cn: 在大亮山，高大的绿树生长着。鸟儿在到处歌唱。
children.statement: 现在的大亮山光秃秃的。
children.explanation: 文中说大亮山长满了高大的绿树。

children.text: But about 40 years ago, it was very different there. It changed because of Yang Shanzhou.
children.cn: 但大约40年前，那里非常不同。它因为杨善洲而改变了。
children.explanation: different 形容事物之间有差异。

children.text: In 1988, at the age of 61, he gave up a good life in the city.
children.cn: 1988年，61岁的他放弃了城市里的优越生活。
children.statement: give up 的意思是“放弃”。
children.explanation: give up 是一个常用短语，意为不再做某事或放弃某物。

children.text: "I want to do something for my hometown," said Yang.
children.cn: “我想为我的家乡做点什么，”杨善洲说。
children.explanation: hometown 是指一个人出生或成长的地方。

children.text: He moved to the mountains and worked hard to make them green. Life was very hard, but he never gave up.
children.cn: 他搬到了山里，努力工作使大山变绿。生活非常艰苦，但他从未放弃。
children.statement: 杨善洲因为生活艰苦而放弃了。
children.explanation: 文中说 he never gave up (他从未放弃)。

children.text: He broke his left leg at the age of 72. But he was back to work after only half a year.
children.cn: 他在72岁时摔断了左腿。但仅半年后他就重新开始工作了。
children.statement: broke 是 break 的过去式。
children.explanation: break 表示骨折或打破，过去式是不规则的 broke。

children.text: After 22 years, the Daliang Mountains became a green world, with over 10 million trees.
children.cn: 22年后，大亮山变成了一个绿色的世界，拥有超过1000万棵树。
children.explanation: million 表示“百万”，10 million 是“一千万”。

children.text: By planting trees, Yang Shanzhou also planted hope. His hard work gave people a brighter and greener life.
children.cn: 通过植树，杨善洲也播种了希望。他的辛勤工作给了人们一个更光明、更绿色的生活。
children.statement: brighter 是 bright 的比较级。
children.explanation: 形容词后加 er 构成比较级，表示“更...”。
